message:
fix(sdk): remove incorrect const fn on mutable-ref methods and scope
mutex lock guards in tool hook tests

- Replace const fn with #[allow(clippy::missing_const_for_fn)] on
  as_in_process_mut() and as_rpc_mut() — mutable references through
  enum matching cannot be const
- Scope lock guards in event_listeners_tool_hooks_fire test to avoid
  holding locks across unrelated assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
